name: Backhand Brew
description: Backhand Brew is a place to play pickleball in Saint Michael, MN. There are 4 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, trainers or lessons, a pro shop or equipment store, and lights. The courts can be reserved.

name: Bison Activity Center Buffalo High School
description: Come play pickleball at Bison Activity Center Buffalo High School in Buffalo, MN! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Buffalo Community Middle School
description: Buffalo Community Middle School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Buffalo, MN. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Forum
description: Forum has 4 indoor pickleball courts, golf simulators, a fitness center and office space!

name: Monticello Community Center
description: Open play available during scheduled times. Please view the gym schedule online at: www.monticellocommunitycenter.com for details.

name: Riverway Park
description: Riverway Park is a place to play pickleball in Delano, MN. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Town Center Park
description: Come play pickleball at Town Center Park in St. Michael, MN! There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
